title: CodeVerse Academy
description: A premium Next.js learning platform for web development, data science, AI/ML, interview prep, practice work, certificates, blogs, and guided reading. Features interactive code playground, AI revision assistant, certificate studio, and comprehensive tutorial books.

title: LifeOS AI
description: A full-stack SaaS platform combining time management, career planning, habit tracking, and AI coaching into one unified dashboard. Features AI-powered coaching via OpenAI/Gemini/Claude, gamification (XP, levels, streaks), Docker deployment, and CI/CD.
